title: Best TH14 War Base 2024 – Anti 3 Star
description: Top-tier TH14 anti-3 star war base with centralized Town Hall, overlapping Scattershots, and strategic Inferno Tower placement. Tested in competitive CWL battles.
keyFeatures: Centralized Town Hall with 4-layer wall protection
Dual Scattershots covering all approach angles
Inferno Towers on single-target mode for Queen Walk counter
Anti-funnel compartments blocking Super Witch smash
Eagle Artillery positioned to activate on full army deployment
howToUse: Copy the base link and open Clash of Clans
Go to your village layout editor
Paste the link in the import section
Adjust hero positions to match your hero levels
Fill Clan Castle with Super Minions or Headhunters
Test with a friendly challenge before war
tips: Set both Inferno Towers to single-target above 4500 cups
Place a Giant Bomb cluster near the Town Hall entrance
Keep your CC at max health — request fresh troops daily in war
Monitor replays after each war to identify attack patterns
about: This TH14 war base was designed by analyzing top 1% clan war attack patterns. The compartmentalized design forces attackers to commit to suboptimal pathing, reducing 3-star success rates by over 60% in testing.

faq.question: Is this base effective against Queen Charge LaLoon?
faq.answer: Yes. The split air defense placement and high HP compartments make Queen Charge LaLoon very difficult to execute successfully.

faq.question: What CC troops work best with this war base?
faq.answer: Super Minions as primary DPS with a Headhunter to target the attacker's heroes is the recommended setup.

faq.question: How often should I update this base?
faq.answer: Update every 2-3 CWL seasons or when you notice a new attack strategy consistently working against it.

title: Best TH14 Farming Base 2024 – Dark Elixir Protection
description: TH14 farming base focused on protecting dark elixir and resources. Collector-outside design baits attackers while securing storages in the center.
keyFeatures: Dark elixir storage double-compartmented in center
Collectors placed outside to bait attacks
Giga Inferno covering Town Hall perimeter
Anti-hog Bomb Tower placement
Resource storages protected by overlapping defenses
howToUse: Apply the base link to your home village
Leave collectors and mines partially outside
Fill CC with Witch + Ice Golem for resource defense
Log on twice daily to collect and spend excess loot
Keep walls upgraded to minimize easy loot access
tips: Spend loot below raid threshold before logging off
Upgrade dark elixir storage walls first
Use Treasury to protect bonus loot during events
Enable notifications to check for large raids
about: This farming layout is optimized for TH14 players in Masters League who need to protect dark elixir for hero upgrades while maintaining consistent farming income.

faq.question: Should my Town Hall be inside or outside the base?
faq.answer: At TH14, keep the Town Hall inside. The Town Hall shield is not worth losing its defensive value and hero regeneration speed.

faq.question: What's the safest league for TH14 farming?
faq.answer: Crystal I to Masters III provides the best loot-to-activity ratio for TH14 players.

faq.question: How do I protect against Super Goblin raids?
faq.answer: Cluster your storages behind walls. Super Goblins target resources — making them harder to reach reduces loot lost per raid.

Log on every 3 hours in Legend to maximize attack opportunities

about: Designed for competitive TH14 trophy pushers targeting 5000+ cups. The asymmetric design confuses funneling attempts and protects the Town Hall through multiple defensive layers.

faq.question: What's the fastest way to reach Legend League at TH14?
faq.answer: Push during off-peak hours, use 3-star attack strategies, and maintain a base that holds at least 40% of defenses for 1-star or better.

faq.question: How many trophies do I need to enter Legend League?
faq.answer: You need to finish the season with 5000+ trophies to qualify for Legend League the following season.

faq.question: Is a ring base better for trophy pushing at TH14?
faq.answer: Ring bases can be effective but are vulnerable to certain Queen Charge routes. The compartmentalized design shown here offers better all-around protection.

faq.question: How do I counter Yeti Smash at TH13?
faq.answer: Use Scattershots and Inferno Towers on multi-target. The spread defenses in this base force Yetis into suboptimal positions.

faq.question: What level should my walls be for this base to work?
faq.answer: Minimum level 11 walls are recommended. Level 12-13 walls significantly improve the base's effectiveness.

faq.question: Can this base defend against a max TH14 attack?
faq.answer: No base can guarantee defense against a max TH14 attack, but this design maximizes the difficulty of achieving 3 stars.

faq.question: Should I drop trophies for better farming at TH13?
faq.answer: Dropping to Crystal III or Masters I often provides the best loot-to-effort ratio at TH13, but it depends on your activity level.

faq.question: What's the best strategy to get dark elixir fast at TH13?
faq.answer: Use Super Goblins to raid other TH13+ bases in Masters league. Target bases with exposed dark elixir drills.

faq.question: How do I prevent Super Goblin raids from stealing my dark elixir?
faq.answer: Cluster storages behind walls 3-4 layers deep and upgrade your Inferno Towers — they shred Super Goblins effectively.

faq.question: What attacks does this base defend best against?
faq.answer: This base is designed to defend against Root Rider Dragon Rider, Super Witch Smash, and Hybrid attacks — the three dominant TH15 strategies.

faq.question: How do I counter Root Riders specifically?
faq.answer: Spread Bomb Towers and place them near walls. Root Riders target walls — your Bomb Towers will activate as they approach.

faq.question: Is this base suitable for CWL Titan league?
faq.answer: Yes, this base was designed and tested in Titan I and Champion III league environments.

faq.question: What's the minimum defense level for Legend League at TH15?
faq.answer: There is no minimum, but at least level 5 Monolith and level 65 Scattershots are recommended for competitive defenses.

faq.question: How many cups per day do Legend League players gain/lose?
faq.answer: Top players average +40 to +80 cups per day in season. A solid base design should limit net losses below 20 cups from defenses.

faq.question: Can I get to top 200 global at TH15?
faq.answer: Top 200 global typically requires 5800+ cups, perfect 8/8 attack days, and a base that holds 50%+ of defenses.

faq.question: Should I keep my heroes available for war or upgrade them?
faq.answer: In active war or CWL, keep heroes available. Use the post-war period (non-CWL week) for hero upgrades.

faq.question: What's the best attack strategy for BH10?
faq.answer: Super P.E.K.K.A + Night Witch is the dominant strategy. Your base should spread defenses to minimize Super PEKKA bounce efficiency.

faq.question: How important is the Builder Base for main village progress?
faq.answer: Very important. The B.O.B cannon (O.T.T.O) provides a powerful free builder equivalent that significantly speeds up main village upgrades.

faq.question: What's the most common TH9 attack strategy?
faq.answer: GoWiPe (Golem, Witch, P.E.K.K.A) and mass Dragons are the most common. This base is specifically designed to counter both.

faq.question: Should I use this base for farming too?

faq.question: What level should my heroes be for TH9 war?
faq.answer: Barbarian King level 10+ and Archer Queen level 5+ are recommended minimum levels for effective war performance at TH9.

faq.question: How do I protect against Electro Dragon farming attacks at TH11?
faq.answer: Spread your Air Defenses so they cannot all be hit by 2-3 lightning spells. This is the most effective counter.
